task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the invoice details page for 'INV-ECO-994' in Vtiger CRM. The 'Status' field must be clearly set to 'Cancel'.

task_completion.description: Add a comment explaining the cancellation containing 'Return' or 'Refund'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the comments, history, or updates section on the 'INV-ECO-994' invoice page. There must be a visible comment added by the user containing the word 'Return' or 'Refund'.

task_completion.description: Create a Trouble Ticket titled 'RMA' or 'Return' associated with Alex Mercer and the product
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Trouble Ticket details page. The Title must be exactly 'RMA' or 'Return'. The 'Contact Name' field must be linked to 'Alex Mercer' and the 'Product Name' field must be linked to 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)'.

task_completion.description: Set the Trouble Ticket status to 'Closed' and priority to 'High'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Trouble Ticket details page created for the RMA. The 'Status' field must be set to 'Closed' and the 'Priority' field must be set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Increase the 'Qty in Stock' for 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)' by exactly 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product details page or edit screen for 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)'. The 'Qty in Stock' field should be visible, showing evidence that the agent edited and increased the stock number.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the CRM
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is using a web browser to navigate Vtiger CRM, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or scripts to manipulate the system.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Vtiger CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual Vtiger CRM interface with its standard menus and layouts, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not open a database management tool (like phpMyAdmin or a mysql terminal) to directly edit the invoice, ticket, or product records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Invoice Subject: 'INV-ECO-994'. Expected Invoice Status: 'Cancel'. Expected Ticket Status: 'Closed'. Expected Ticket Priority: 'High'. Target Contact: 'Alex Mercer'. Target Product: 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)'.
